## Optional Inputs

The following input variables are optional (have default values):

### <a name="input_credentials"></a> [credentials](#input\_credentials)

Description: The credentials that can be used for authenticating the token.

- `certificates` - The certificates property.
- `passwords` - The passwords property.

Type:

```hcl
object({
    certificates = optional(list(object({
      encoded_pem_certificate = optional(string)
      expiry                  = optional(string)
      name                    = optional(any)
      thumbprint              = optional(string)
    })))
    passwords = optional(list(object({
      creation_time = optional(string)
      expiry        = optional(string)
      name          = optional(any)
    })))
  })
```

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_enable_telemetry"></a> [enable\_telemetry](#input\_enable\_telemetry)

Description: This variable controls whether or not telemetry is enabled for the module. For more information see https://aka.ms/avm/telemetryinfo.

Type: `bool`

Default: `true`

### <a name="input_scope_map_id"></a> [scope\_map\_id](#input\_scope\_map\_id)

Description: The resource ID of the scope map to which the token will be associated with.

Type: `string`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_status"></a> [status](#input\_status)

Description: The status of the token example enabled or disabled.

Type: `any`

Default: `null`
